items.q: When and where is the festival?
items.a: Saturday 25 May 2026 at Parc del Fòrum, Barcelona. Gates open at 4pm.
Tickets are available on our Tickets page. Early Bird, Regular and VIP options.
Yes. The venue has accessible entrances, toilets and viewing areas. Contact us for specific needs.
Tickets are non-refundable except if the event is cancelled. See our Terms for details.
Small bags allowed. No glass, no professional cameras. Full list at the entrance.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Get in touch
contact.formSuccess: Thank you! We'll get back to you soon.

location.title: Location
location.subtitle: Parc del Fòrum, Barcelona
location.description: An iconic space by the Mediterranean Sea
location.transport: Metro: L4 El Maresme | Fòrum. Tram: T4. Bus: 7, 36, 41.

about.title: About the Festival
about.description: A day of celebration of diversity and queer music in Barcelona. A unique experience that brings together the LGTBIQ+ community through art and music.

values.title: Our Values
values.diversityDesc: We celebrate all gender identities and expressions
values.artDesc: Music as a tool for social change

lineup.title: Line-up
lineup.subtitle: Discover the artists that will make the festival vibrate

legal.privacyIntro: QM Fest respects your privacy. This policy explains how we collect and use your data.
privacySections: We collect the data you provide when buying tickets (email, name) and when you contact us or subscribe to the newsletter.
We use this data to process orders, send confirmations and event updates, and to communicate with you.
We do not sell your data to third parties. We may share data with service providers (e.g. payment processor) strictly necessary for the service.
You can request access, rectification or deletion of your data by writing to us.
legal.cookiesIntro: We use cookies and similar technologies on our website.
cookiesSections: Essential cookies: necessary for the site to function (e.g. language, consent).
Analytics cookies: we may use tools to understand how visitors use the site (anonymous).
You can accept all cookies or only essential ones via the banner. You can change your choice later.

cookiesBanner.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and analytics.
